titleStmt.title: Zheng Shuzu chong deng Yunfeng shan ji (rubbing)
鄭叔祖重登雲峰山記（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription: Zheng Shuzu chong deng Yunfeng shan ji. GENUINE Zheng Daozhao Yunfeng shan (雲峰山) cliff inscription ('record of re-ascending Yunfeng shan'). Companion records for the same inscription: 244545, 244546, 244547. UC Berkeley EAL Chinese Rubbings Collection (Hsin149).

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: Catalogued 564 (post-dates Zheng Daozhao d.516; the Yunfeng/Tianzhu cliff project is dated c.511-516 — catalogue date uncertain). From 北魏鄭道昭碑全拓舊本 set.

bibl.ref: C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from C.V. Starr East Asian Library, University of California, Berkeley via the Epiwen multi-repository workflow. IIIF deep-zoom, open access (CORS-enabled).

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
